channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: 6 roadblocks to IT innovation
item.description: CIOs now list innovation as the most important trait they need to bring to their role, according to a 2024 survey by professional services firm Deloitte — ahead of delivering top-line value and serving as change agents, two endeavors that require innovation to facilitate.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The iPad mini 7 may have fixed Apple's long-standing 'jelly scrolling' problem
item.description: We're hearing that the new iPad mini might fix one of the annoyances that came with the old iPad mini.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The latest OnePlus 13 teaser reveals the announcement date and the phone's full back in a trio of colors
item.description: The OnePlus 13 is landing on October 31, and between a teaser and leaks we know what to expect from the design.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Cepsa Exploración y Producción finiquita su plan de digitalización 360 avalando la unión entre TI y negocio
item.description: El 30 de marzo del 2022 la cúpula de Cepsa, multinacional energética española, presentaba en sociedad un nuevo plan estratégico con el que marcaba un antes y un después en el negocio.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Rising crypto scams leave Americans reeling from billions in losses
item.description: Scammers have illustrated that cryptocurrency is not as foolproof as it has promised. Americans lost $5.6 billion to crypto scams in 2023, according to the FBI.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: October is Cybersecurity Awareness Month. Here's how to stay safe from scams
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — October is Cybersecurity Awareness Month, which means it's the perfect time to learn how to protect yourself from scams. “Scams have become so sophisticated now.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA MORGA, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: US to probe Tesla's 'Full Self-Driving' system after pedestrian killed in low visibility conditions
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — The U.S. government's road safety agency is investigating Tesla's “Full Self-Driving” system after getting reports of crashes in low-visibility conditions, including one that killed a pedestrian.
item.dc:creator: TOM KRISHER, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Judge delays order in antitrust case requiring Google to open up its app store
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — A federal judge on Friday delayed an order requiring Google to open up its Android app store to more competition until an appeals court decides whether to block the shake-up because of legal questions surrounding a jury's verdict that branded Google as an illegal monopolist.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Google, Meta, and TikTok shut down a Russian drone factory’s accounts over bombshell investigation
item.description: Google, Meta and TikTok have removed social media accounts belonging to an industrial plant in Russia’s Tatarstan region aimed at recruiting young foreign women to make drones for Moscow’s war in Ukraine.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: How AI can help federal agencies make the most of limited budgets
item.description: In today’s budget environment, agency leaders are often asked to do more with less. The post How AI can help federal agencies make the most of limited budgets first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Augmented reality screens are a feature, not a product
item.description: Apple released a claustrophobic submarine movie for Apple Vision Pro earlier this month, and it gave me a sinking feeling. The movie Submerged was neither augmented reality (AR) nor virtual reality (VR) nor 360-degree video. It was more like 180-degree video.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The Menendez brothers’ house is all over TikTok following the hit Netflix drama
item.description: With the recent release of the Netflix drama Monsters: The Lyle and Erik Menendez Story and the follow-up documentary The Menendez Brothers, true-crime enthusiasts are now turning their attention to the Beverly Hills mansion where it all went down.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: One Direction was the internet's first boy band, and Liam Payne its grounding force
item.description: One Direction member Liam Payne was found dead this week after falling from a hotel balcony in Buenos Aires, Argentina, at just 31.
item.dc:creator: Maria Sherman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Scientists show how sperm and egg come together like a key in a lock
item.description: Scientists have pinpointed how sperm and egg fuse together across the animal kingdom, from fish to people.
item.dc:creator: Laura Ungar, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Alabama man arrested for hacking Securities and Exchange Commission X account
item.description: Following the unauthorized announcement made during the hack, the DOJ said the price of bitcoin increased by more than $1,000 per bitcoin.
item.dc:creator: Logan Sparkman, NewsNation

item.title: iOS 18 Privacy Settings: Enhance Your iPhone Experience
item.description: Discover three essential iOS 18 settings to boost your iPhone's privacy, ensuring a more secure experience without sacrificing convenience.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Run a business? Then you need to join this Apple service
item.description: Apple just gave smaller enterprises a chance to compete on a more equal basis with larger concerns with three nice improvements to Apple Business Connect: Business Caller ID, brand identity in Mail, and custom business logos for use with Tap to Pay.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: US agency adopts rule to make it easier for consumers to cancel unwanted subscriptions
item.description: The Federal Trade Commission adopted a final rule Wednesday that will require businesses to make it easy for consumers to cancel unwanted subscriptions and memberships.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump thinks Google split would weaken US against China
item.description: The potential split up of Google that’s been proposed by the US Department of Justice (DOJ) could weaken the company, and thus the position of the US in its tech war with China, said former President Donald Trump, who suggested he may not break up the company if he wins the presidency again in Novem
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: A10 Networks tackles AI threats with platform updates
item.description: A10 Networks is updating its platforms in a bid to help enterprises deal with increasing risks, including those that might come from AI-driven attacks. The improvements to the network security vendor’s technology span multiple products.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: End user empowerment: Shifting the cybersecurity responsibility
item.description: After 21 years of Cybersecurity Awareness Months, maybe it’s time to reconsider the burden we place on end users. The post End user empowerment: Shifting the cybersecurity responsibility first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: AI-powered scam targets 2.5 billion Gmail users in sophisticated phishing attacks
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson talks about a new AI-powered scam that targets Gmail users and is harder to detect unless you're very cautious.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AT&T and Broadcom near settlement in VMware support dispute
item.description: AT&T and Broadcom are close to resolving their legal dispute over VMware support services, according to a joint letter filed in the New York Supreme Court on October 11. The letter requests a postponement of the upcoming hearing, as both sides make progress toward a settlement.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Hacked robo-vacuums chase owners, yell slurs
item.description: Some customers report the tiny tech tools chased them around their homes and barraged them with profanities.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Mexico says foreign firms have pledged $20 billion in investments, but many are old or uncertain
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexican officials announced Tuesday what they claimed was $20 billion in new foreign direct investment in Mexico, but much of that was neither new, nor completely certain.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Netskope extends data security with Dasera acquisition
item.description: Netskope today announced it has broadened its data protection capabilities by integrating data security posture management (DSPM) technology into its Netskope One Platform via its acquisition of Dasera.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia: Latest news and insights
item.description: When it comes to innovation and the technology to drive it, few companies today rival Nvidia. The company has leveraged its GPU expertise to become a dominant player in the AI market. Nvidia’s GPU pedigree dates back decades to high-powered processors originally built for gaming systems.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia contributes Blackwell rack design to Open Compute Project
item.description: In the competitive world of enterprise IT vendors, it may be a surprise that some companies are freely sharing their designs, but that’s exactly what the 50-plus voting members and more than 300 community members and startups, including the major hyperscalers and chipmakers, of the Open Compute Proj
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Countries that have cashed in on their top-level domain names
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Anguilla is raking in extra revenue from registration fees for its .ai web domain thanks to the artificial intelligence boom, but it's not the only place cashing in on demand for websites with distinctive address endings.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Cato Networks extends SASE platform with digital experience monitoring
item.description: Cato Networks today introduced digital experience monitoring (DEM) capabilities that will augment the company’s cloud SASE platform with application traffic and network performance data that IT operations teams need to optimize end-user experiences.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: At the mercy of social media
item.description: I like Instagram as much as the next guy. I check in daily on my carefully curated feed of folks I follow and then work hard not to doomscroll the day away. One of my favorite follows is an adorable Corgi (aren’t they all adorable?) named Parsnip.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Tech consultant goes on trial in death of Cash App founder Bob Lee
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The tech consultant charged in Cash App founder Bob Lee's stabbing death had no motive to kill him and in fact was forced to defend himself against Lee, who had become aggressive while on a multiday drug bender, lawyers for Nima Momeni said in opening statements Monday.
item.dc:creator: JANIE HAR, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Windows users are being tricked by sneaky malware scheme
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals how security experts found new malware, Lumma Stealer, spreading via fake verification pages.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
